lastReleaseMessage: v0.57.6 - asset-scale modifier + per-type consolidation, editor previews on 24 scenes, asset_preview + map_preview boards, tile scaler + gated chunk ground, tree-density knob; Spine2D direction set

barRaise.topFinding: The tripwire the 06-09 review set has fired: it warned the next review is stalled if the M1 survival loop is not built, and it was not. Zero commits landed since that at-risk review and the working tree is byte-identical (same six modified files, same untracked editor_preview_auto.gd, none committed or reverted). This is the third consecutive review with wave spawning, the oil-zero fail, fog of war, and the Hold the Wall mission all open, and the first cycle that produced nothing at all, not even tooling. The loop is blocked on nothing external. Commit or revert the dirty tree, then wire waves, oil-zero fail, fog of war, and a win/lose state on placeholder art.
